example_failures.question: What is the total revenue from completed payments?

example_failures.question: Which 5 product categories generated the most revenue from completed orders?
example_failures.generated_sql: SELECT category, SUM(line_total) as total_revenue FROM order_items WHERE order_id IN ( SELECT order_id FROM orders WHERE status = 'completed' ) GROUP BY category ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 5
example_failures.gold_sql: SELECT p.category, SUM(oi.line_total) rev FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id=o.order_id JOIN products p ON oi.product_id=p.product_id WHERE o.status='completed' GROUP BY p.category ORDER BY rev DESC LIMIT 5;

example_failures.question: How many customers are in each tier?
example_failures.generated_sql: SELECT tier, COUNT(*) FROM customers GROUP BY tier
example_failures.gold_sql: SELECT tier, COUNT(*) FROM customers GROUP BY tier ORDER BY tier;
example_failures.reason: No column alignment produces matching row order (gold SQL has a top-level ORDER BY, so row order matters)
